overview: ÆSTRALTØ is a modular isometric tile-based tactics RPG on the Internet Computer with turn-based combat, summons, spells, and procedurally generated maps.
features: Turn-based isometric combat with enemies and summons
Summon system with lifespan and archetype AI profiles
Spell system with barriers, DoTs, and buffs
Procedurally generated maps with reachability guarantees
Internet Identity authentication and backend-authoritative state
